---
title: "Gallery"
page-layout: full
body-classes: gallery-page
---

::: {.slideshow}

![](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 1.jpeg){.slide .active}
![](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 2.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 3.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 6.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/ASCE Maine Section Meeting.JPG){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Babak Fieldwork 1.JPG){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/BBQ Social 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/BBQ Social 2.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Belal Fieldwork 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Christmas Lights Social.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/End of The Yeat Social 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Engineering Expo 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/First Executive Board.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoCon Members photo 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoCon Members photo 2.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoCongress2025.JPG){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoFrontiers Members Photo 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoFrontiers Members Photo 2.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/GeoFrontiers Members Photo 3.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Geolegends.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 1.JPEG){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 2.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 3.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 4.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Juan Sebastian Fieldwork.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Rakesh Fieldwork.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Recruiter 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 1.JPG){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 2.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 3.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 4.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 5.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 6.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 7.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 8.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 9.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 10.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 11.jpeg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Seaboard 1.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Temi Fieldwork.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Temi.jpg){.slide}
![](Images/Gallery/Tufts 1.jpg){.slide}

:::
